texts.label: text
texts.orig: We would like to take this opportunity to sincerely thank you for your invaluable support over the past years. Your trust and partnership have been instrumental in our success, and we deeply appreciate it.
texts.text: We would like to take this opportunity to sincerely thank you for your invaluable support over the past years. Your trust and partnership have been instrumental in our success, and we deeply appreciate it.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please find attached our applicable rates for 2025, which are commissionable at 15% and more information on our facility.
texts.text: Please find attached our applicable rates for 2025, which are commissionable at 15% and more information on our facility.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We look forward to a fruitful partnership and continued collaboration. If we currently have an active contract with you, please disregard this email.
texts.text: We look forward to a fruitful partnership and continued collaboration. If we currently have an active contract with you, please disregard this email.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Wishing you a year filled with prosperity, success, and new achievements.
texts.text: Wishing you a year filled with prosperity, success, and new achievements.
